corporate_income_tax.label: 企业所得税 (CIT) 2025 — standard
corporate_income_tax.notes: 标准税率25%; 高新技术企业(HNTE)15%; 小型微利企业≤300万CNY适用20%; 微利≤100万CNY适用5%

corporate_income_tax_hnte.label: 企业所得税 — 高新技术企业 (HNTE) 2025
corporate_income_tax_hnte.notes: 高新技术企业优惠税率15%

corporate_income_tax_sme.label: 企业所得税 — 小型微利企业 2025

individual_income_tax.label: 个人所得税综合所得 (IIT) 2025
individual_income_tax.notes: 个人所得税综合所得年度税率表(7级超额累进); 基本减除费用5000元/月(6万/年)

iit_basic_deduction_monthly_cny.label: 个人所得税基本减除费用 (月) 2025
iit_basic_deduction_monthly_cny.notes: 月基本减除费用5000元 (年度6万元)

vat_standard.label: 增值税标准税率 2025
vat_standard.notes: 一般纳税人标准税率13% (货物及有形动产租赁)

vat_construction.label: 增值税 — 建筑/不动产 2025
vat_construction.notes: 建筑服务、不动产销售/租赁适用9%

vat_services.label: 增值税 — 现代服务/金融 2025
vat_services.notes: 现代服务业、金融服务、生活服务、无形资产适用6%

vat_small_taxpayer.label: 增值税 — 小规模纳税人 2025
vat_small_taxpayer.notes: 小规模纳税人征收率3%; 部分行业1%优惠(暂时性政策)

vat_export.label: 增值税 — 出口零税率 2025
vat_export.notes: 出口货物和服务适用零税率并可申请退税

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
Entity type, local, provincial/state, surtax, relief, filing, withholding, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, municipal, provincial/state, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
